english: Hanuman, son of Anjani, son of the Wind, of great strength
roman: Hanuman Anjanisunuh Vayu putro Maha balah

english: Dear to Rama, friend of Arjuna (Phalguna), reddish-eyed, of immeasurable heroism
roman: Rameshta Phalguna sakhah pingakshoh amita vikramah

english: He who crossed the ocean and destroyed Sita's grief
Giver of life to Lakshmana and destroyer of the pride of the ten-headed Ravana
With a thunderbolt body, greatly radiant, who gave Rama the crest jewel from Sita
roman: Vajrakaya maha teja Rama chudamani pradah

english: Messenger of Rama, illustrious, the monkey, son of Kesari
roman: Rama dutah prataapavan Vanarah Kesari sutah

english: Whoever reads the Hanuman Sahasranama Stotram with devotion
roman: Hanumat sahasranama stotram yah pathed bhaktiman

hindi: हनुमत्प्रसादाद् बलं विद्यां मोक्षं च लभते॥
english: By Hanuman's grace attains strength, learning and liberation
roman: Hanumat prasadad balam vidyam moksham cha labhate
